args.query:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS owner_id,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS date), CAST(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) AS date))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS date) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT TRIM(REPLACE(o.OwnerId,'#','')) AS owner_id,
       AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS date), CAST(TRIM(c.CompanySignedDate) AS date))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON TRIM(REPLACE(o.ContractID__c,'#','')) = TRIM(REPLACE(c.Id,'#',''))
WHERE CAST(TRIM(o.CreatedDate) AS date) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
